compiled_state.title: RED: Create test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh asserting --tags flag is documented
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement

Create tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh — a new structural test file asserting that plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md documents the --tags flag on the ticket create command. This test must FAIL (RED) before the ticket-cli-reference.md update in the dependent task runs.

## Test filename fuzzy-match check

- Source: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md → normalized basename: ticketclireferencemd
- Test: tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh → normalized: testticketcliferencemdt ags → ticketclireferencemd is NOT a substring

Since the fuzzy match does not work (normalized source contains 'md' suffix which test filename does not), a .test-index entry is required.

## What to create

tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh:

- Loads REFERENCE_MD="$PLUGIN_ROOT/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md"
- test_ticket_cli_reference_has_tags_flag: assert_contains '...' '--tags' "$ref_content"
- test_ticket_cli_reference_tags_in_create_section: verify --tags appears in the create subcommand section (not just mentioned elsewhere)
- test_ticket_cli_reference_cli_user_example: verify a CLI_user example appears in the reference

## Files to create

- tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh (new)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh
- [ ] Test file asserts --tags flag appears in ticket-cli-reference.md
  Verify: grep -q 'tags' tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh
- [ ] Test fails before ticket-cli-reference.md is updated (confirming RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry added mapping plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md to tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-cli-reference.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (test itself is syntactically valid)
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
